description_long: This is a tall, rectangular stone grave marker with a slanted top, set on a two-tiered base. The front face features engraved inscriptions, including names, dates, and an epitaph, with the surname 'GASON' prominently carved into the lower base. The stone appears weathered, with some moss or lichen growth at the base, indicating age and exposure to the elements. The back and sides are plain, lacking any visible decoration or inscription. The monument is set on a patch of earth, with some grass and soil visible around the base. The overall appearance is solemn and dignified, typical of traditional cemetery headstones.
description: A tall, weathered stone grave marker with engraved inscriptions and a slanted top, set on a two-tiered base with the surname 'GASON' carved in relief.
description_view_0: Front view showing engraved inscriptions and the 'GASON' name on the base.
description_view_1: Rear view displaying a plain, unadorned stone surface with no visible inscriptions.
description_view_2: Side view highlighting the monument's thickness and the slanted top, with no visible text.
description_view_3: Angled front view showing both the inscribed face and the side, with the 'GASON' name visible.
